title: Shady Lady
writer: Curt Siodmak, Gerald Geraghty, M.M. Musselman
actors: Charles Coburn, Robert Paige, Ginny Simms
plot: A professional gambler is caught cheating and sent to prison. Eventually paroled, he decides to make a fresh start and takes his niece, an aspiring singer, to Chicago. Once there, however, she gets mixed up with a mobster and wind...
